name: One Spa at RACV Cape Schanck Resort
address: Trent Jones Dr, Cape Schanck VIC 3939
signature: The Peninsula's best resort-style day spa — proper scale, serious treatment menu, and a cliff-edge location that nobody else on the Peninsula can match
editorNote:
One Spa at RACV Cape Schanck is the Peninsula's most complete resort spa offering. It is larger and better equipped than most of the boutique day-spa rooms on the Peninsula, sits inside a resort with an 18-hole golf course and proper infrastructure, and has one of the most dramatic coastal settings of any spa in the country — high on the cliffs above Cape Schanck with Southern Ocean views the whole way.

The treatment menu is broad and well-executed rather than experimental: massage, facials, body treatments, couples packages, and scrubs from the major botanical brands. Therapists are consistently strong. The wet areas — steam, sauna, vitality pool — are where the resort layer shows, and they are better than anything offered at a standalone day spa on the Peninsula.

The pairing that works: a spa morning here, then a round on the RACV Cape Schanck course or a walk on Cape Schanck lighthouse trail, then dinner at the resort or at Jackalope fifteen minutes away. For non-resort guests it is a bookable day-spa experience. For resort guests it is the anchor of a serious wellness stay.

Book midweek if you want the full circuit without feeling rushed. Weekend appointments fill three to four weeks out in peak season.

heroImage.alt: Coastal resort pool and spa vitality circuit at One Spa, RACV Cape Schanck Resort, Mornington Peninsula
